---
title: "Openshaw-MAUP"
author: "Peter Kedron, Emily Zhou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    css: styles.css
    code_folding: hide
    highlight: haddock
    theme: lumen
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: 4
    toc_float: yes
urlcolor: blue  
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: sentence
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
